title: CombatEvolution
description: This mod provides a advanced EpicFight AI lib for code and datapck, also added execution feature for combat
body:
## Description
This mod provides developers with a new lib of mob combat behaviors, included custom mob stamina, mob guard ability, behavior interrupt, time event and so on. Also, this mod added execution ability to player. When target neutralized, press execution key to execute target. You can also register your own execution icon and execution type. 

## Datapack support
This mod also added datapack mob support. For the example, you can check on github
### English Document
CombatEvolution/datapack_English_Document.json at master · ShelMarow/CombatEvolution
### 中文说明
CombatEvolution/datapack数据包全参数说明.json at master · ShelMarow/CombatEvolution

### Discord Channel / DC频道 ：
https://discord.gg/EVb5tPqdZ

## Bosses Made By CombatEvolution 
![Arterius](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d14172a4f90aa1a6f4f8b4a545ab7ab9a5e8ed63.png)

![ScarletHunter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5037976165563cb47e982978c42915c1f687e0f.png)

## Other Info
In future updates, other features will continue to be improved, and if you have any suggestions, feel free to leave your comments
